title: dactylorhiza sphagnicola subsp. sennia
intro: Dactylorhiza sphagnicola subsp. sennia, also known as marsh orchid or bog orchid, is a type of orchid native to mountainous regions, particularly in the Mediterranean area. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza sphagnicola subsp. sennia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional remedies and supplements.
